Storage Audit and Consolidation Plan

Start here → The Play for the architectural overview, target directory layout, and 7-phase summary. The file-level audit below maps every phase to exact source files with owner/loader/writer/propagation roles.

Static repo audit generated from git ls-files -co --exclude-standard on 2026-03-30. Disk inventory verified 2026-03-29. Decision: .workspace/ is the unified runtime root. 11 write locations → 2.

The Play: Storage Consolidation at a Glance

This section is the architectural context for the file-level audit below. Read this first to understand what is broken, what the target looks like, and how to get there. The phase audit that follows maps every claim here to exact source files.

Honest Assessment

The storage organization does not match CLAUDE.md, does not match how the rest of the app is organized, and has active bugs.

  • 11 separate write locations for data that should live in 2.
  • %LOCALAPPDATA%\spec-factory\ hides ~1 GB of runtime data in a system folder. Designed for a relocation feature that was never built.
  • The output/specs/outputs/specs/outputs/ double-nesting proves the path layer was never designed — S3 key prefixes are blindly concatenated with local paths.
  • Billing data writes to two different directories simultaneously.
  • Run artifacts for a single run are scattered across 3 separate root directories.
  • CLAUDE.md says "one temp directory: .specfactory_tmp". Reality: 11 write targets.
  • Crawlee dumps 17 MB of crawler state into storage/ at project root via implicit default (no explicit config).
  • specs/ at project root is not gitignored.
  • The app's code follows feature-first vertical slicing. The file storage is the opposite.

11PROJECT\.server-state\354 KBPID + server logOK but undocumented

Active Bugs

Bug 1: Double-Nesting Path (Phase A)

src/s3/storage.js:206-214 — resolveLocalPath()

S3 keys like specs/outputs/mouse/... include the prefix. resolveLocalPath() joins the full key (with prefix) onto outputRoot, producing output/specs/outputs/mouse/.... For traces, the prefix appears twice: output/specs/outputs/specs/outputs/_runtime/traces/....

Fix: Strip the prefix from the key before path.join.

Bug 2: Duplicate Billing (Phase A)

src/billing/costLedger.js — writeBillingDigest()

costLedger.js maintains two parallel key sets: "legacy" keys (via resolveOutputKey() which prepends specs/outputs/) and "current" keys (bare paths). writeBillingDigest() writes to both simultaneously, creating output/_billing/ AND output/specs/outputs/_billing/.

Fix: Delete legacy key functions, use bare paths only.

SQLite Database Inventory

DatabaseTablesCurrent PathTarget PathStatus
SpecDb (per-category)56 + FTS.specfactory_tmp/{cat}/spec.sqlite.workspace/db/{cat}/spec.sqliteMOVE
AppDb (global)new.specfactory_tmp/app.sqlite.workspace/db/app.sqliteMOVE
FrontierDb3_intel/frontier/frontier.db (hardcoded).workspace/db/{cat}/frontier.sqliteMOVE + FIX
Crawl Probe (2 dirs)?.specfactory_tmp/crawl_probe_reports/ + crawl-probe-reports/OS tmpdirRELOCATE
Orphan Export—.specfactory_tmp/phase9/mouse_all_products.sqliteDelete (staging file from publishProductWriter.js)DELETE

Target Architecture: .workspace/

Principle: Everything in the project root. category_authority/ owns canonical data + global settings. .workspace/ owns ALL runtime output. One run = one directory. SQLite DBs co-locate with the category they serve. Storage settings configure ONE root, not three.

Spec Factory/

  category_authority/                        HELPER_ROOT — canonical data + global config
    _global/_shared/                         8 schema templates
    _global/brand_registry.json
    _runtime/
      user-settings.json                    Persisted GUI settings
      snapshots/                              Per-run settings transport (capped at 10)
    {category}/
      schema.json  sources.json
      _control_plane/                        field_studio_map, product_catalog
      _generated/                            Compiled field rules + component DBs
      _learning/                             ML snapshots (moved from data/learning/)
      _overrides/                            Manual product + component overrides
      _source/                               Seed data
      _suggestions/                          Curation suggestions

  .workspace/                                 ALL runtime output (git-ignored)
    db/
      app.sqlite                             Global app DB
      {category}/                            SQLite databases per category
        spec.sqlite                            Main SpecDb (56 tables + FTS)
        frontier.sqlite                        Research DB (moved from _intel/)
    runs/{runId}/                             ONE run = ONE directory (everything together)
      analysis/                               search_profile, extraction packets, phase summaries
      screenshots/                            Crawl page screenshots (JPG)
      video/                                 Crawl recordings (WebM)
      traces/
        llm/                                 LLM call traces
        search/                              Search query traces
        planner/                             Fetch plan snapshots
      run.json                               Checkpoint for run resumption
      summary.json                           Run summary
    products/{category}/{productId}/          Per-product output
      latest/                                normalized, provenance, search_profile, summary
      published/                             current, compact, changelog, provenance, versions/
      product.json                           Aggregated checkpoint
    billing/                                  ONE billing dir (not two)
      ledger.jsonl
      ledger/  monthly/

  .server-state/                              PID + log (formalized in CLAUDE.md)

Before → After

CurrentTargetWhy
%LOCALAPPDATA%\spec-factory\EliminatedAll data moves to project root — visible and manageable
.specfactory_tmp/{cat}/spec.sqlite.workspace/db/{cat}/spec.sqliteClearer name, under unified dir
.specfactory_tmp/app.sqlite.workspace/db/app.sqliteGlobal DB alongside category DBs
_intel/frontier/frontier.db.workspace/db/{cat}/frontier.sqliteCo-located with SpecDb, per-category
indexlab/{runId}/screenshots/.workspace/runs/{runId}/screenshots/All run files in one place
output/specs/outputs/{cat}/{id}/runs/.workspace/runs/{runId}/analysis/No double-nesting, flat run dir
output/.../specs/outputs/_runtime/traces/.workspace/runs/{runId}/traces/Fixes double-nesting bug
output/.../published/{id}/.workspace/products/{cat}/{id}/published/Under .workspace, not buried in output/specs/outputs
output/_billing/ + output/.../billing/.workspace/billing/One location, not two
data/learning/mouse.*category_authority/mouse/_learning/Per-category, with other category data
.specfactory_tmp/EliminatedDBs move to .workspace/db/, junk deleted
storage/ (Crawlee)OS tmpdir or .workspace/crawlee/Ephemeral crawler state off project root
debug/ + specs/DeletedJunk drawer + bug artifact

The 7 Phases

Strategy: Config-first, then consumers. Change 3 config sources and most consumers follow automatically. Each phase is independently testable.

PhaseWhatKey FilesRisk
A Fix double-nesting path bug — strip S3 key prefixes before path.join src/s3/storage.js resolveLocalPath + listKeys Bug fix
B Redirect defaults to .workspace/ — change 3 config sources runtimeArtifactRoots.js, settingsRegistry.js, contract test High impact
C Fix hardcoded .specfactory_tmp — 34 files with legacy root strings 14 source + 8 test + 4 script + 4 docs + extras Mechanical
D Merge run roots — screenshots + video + analysis + traces into .workspace/runs/{runId}/ runtimeBridgeArtifacts.js, indexlabDataBuilders.js, checkpoint writers Complex
E FrontierDb + learning + junk cleanup — move misplaced DBs, delete orphans frontierDb.js, crawl-probe.mjs, disk cleanup Low
F .gitignore + CLAUDE.md — formalize new structure in project config .gitignore, CLAUDE.md, folder-map.md Low
G Cleanup policies — bounded retention for runs (7-day TTL) + snapshots (cap 10) videoCleanup.js pattern, bootstrap Low

Why This Matters

One run, one directory

.workspace/runs/{runId}/ has screenshots, video, analysis, traces, checkpoint — everything in one place instead of 3 roots.

Visible

Everything in the project folder where you can see it. No more hidden data in %LOCALAPPDATA%.

Matches CLAUDE.md

category_authority/ owns canonical data. .workspace/ owns runtime output. Clean 2-directory boundary.

Trivial cleanup

rm -rf .workspace/runs/{old-runId} cleans everything. Currently you'd delete from 3 separate trees.

No path bugs

Storage keys map directly to .workspace/ subdirs without prefix duplication.

Single config root

If storage settings are rebuilt, they configure .workspace/ as ONE root to relocate — not three.

Verification Protocol (After Each Phase)

  1. node --test — full test suite green
  2. npx tsc --noEmit in tools/gui-react/ — TypeScript check
  3. Start server, run a product, verify run artifacts appear in .workspace/
  4. Verify no files written to old locations (%LOCALAPPDATA%, .specfactory_tmp, specs/, etc.)

Audit Basis

Coverage Rule

Every tracked or unignored file was considered. A file is included in the storage ledger when it is a configured primary owner or when it matches one of the phase/concern signals.

Loads / Writes / Propagation

These are heuristic buckets. They are intended to answer the same question as the schema audit: what code loads from the storage surface, what code writes to it, and what code exposes or depends on it downstream.

Legacy Honesty

Legacy-root references are surfaced separately so stale docs, tests, and compiled mirrors do not masquerade as live storage owners. Missing configured primaries are called out instead of silently skipped.

Limit

This is a static implementation audit. Dynamic path composition and runtime-only file moves can still need manual validation after code changes land.

Highest-Overlap Files

These files show up in the most phase/concern buckets and are the main implementation choke points for the consolidation.

Phase Audit

Each phase below includes the concrete owner files plus the full repo touch surface around that change.

Phase A: Prefix Path Translation Bug

Strip storage key prefixes before joining local output roots.

135 touched files 2 primary 41 loaders 33 writers 84 propagation 61 legacy refs

Phase B: Unified Defaults to .workspace

Make .workspace the single default runtime root for output, runs, and DBs.

Phase E: Frontier, Learning, Crawlee, and Junk Cleanup

Move frontier and learning storage, stop writing junk to legacy roots, and formalize runtime-only directories.

Root Concern Audit

These cross-cutting concerns collapse the phase data into the runtime roots and storage-state surfaces that the codebase has to converge.

.workspace Target Root

Target runtime root for db, runs, products, and billing.
